mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TAB_GOODS_UNIT (S_ID, S_TENANT_ID, S_GOODS_ID, S_UNIT_NAME, I_CONVERT_RATE, DT_CREATE_TIME, DT_UPDATE_TIME, S_CREATE_USER, S_UPDATE_USER) VALUES (#{sId}, #{sTenantId}, #{sGoodsId}, #{sUnitName}, #{iConvertRate}, #{dtCreateTime}, #{dtUpdateTime}, #{sCreateUser}, #{sUpdateUser})
mapper.select: SELECT S_ID, S_GOODS_ID, S_UNIT_NAME, I_CONVERT_RATE, DT_CREATE_TIME, DT_UPDATE_TIME, S_CREATE_USER, S_UPDATE_USER FROM TAB_GOODS_UNIT WHERE S_ID = #{sId}
SELECT S_ID, S_GOODS_ID, S_UNIT_NAME, I_CONVERT_RATE, DT_CREATE_TIME, DT_UPDATE_TIME, S_CREATE_USER, S_UPDATE_USER FROM TAB_GOODS_UNIT WHERE S_GOODS_ID = #{goodsId} ORDER BY I_CONVERT_RATE ASC

SELECT S_ID, S_GOODS_ID, S_UNIT_NAME, I_CONVERT_RATE, DT_CREATE_TIME, DT_UPDATE_TIME, S_CREATE_USER, S_UPDATE_USER FROM TAB_GOODS_UNIT WHERE S_GOODS_ID = #{goodsId} AND S_UNIT_NAME = #{unitName} LIMIT 1
